title: Coding-Guard Metrics Definition
description: Per-rule measurable metrics. Drives self-tuning + telemetry dashboards.

assumption_density.description: Number of stated assumptions per task / number of decision points in task.

loc_delta_percentile.description: Lines added in this PR vs median LoC of similar tasks in repo history.

diff_scope_purity.description: Fraction of changed lines that trace to declared task scope.

verification_loop_closure.description: Whether the verification graph completed: tests written, run, passed, build green.

hallucination_rate.description: Number of unverified API/import claims per 100 tool calls.

fake_verify_count.description: Number of done-claims without exit code evidence.

out_of_scope_edits.description: Number of file edits outside declared task scope.

retry_loop_depth.description: Number of consecutive same-error retries before stopping.

destructive_attempts.description: Attempted destructive ops without explicit confirm.
